message:
feat(dashboard): add embedded static file serving for JS/CSS

- Add embed directive for static/js/*.js and static/css/*.css
- Add StaticFileHandler() to serve embedded static files at /static/
- Include vendored libraries: xterm.js, Alpine.js, htmx, Chart.js, Tailwind
- Update layout template to use /static/ paths

This allows the dashboard to serve all its frontend dependencies without
requiring external CDN access.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
